features: Duracell Plus batteries are multi-purpose alkaline batteries and are suitable for everyday electronic devices
Safety: The superior nylon cover prevents battery leakage.
Durability: Thanks to Duracell's technology, the energy of your unused batteries is maintained in the packaging for up to 10 years (storage at room temperature).
98% of our paper-based packaging is made from recycled materials
AA & AAA made in Belgium - Available in AA, AAA, C, D, 4.5 V & 9 V sizes
* AA size batteries compared to average minimum life in IEC 2015 digital camera test. Results may vary depending on device or usage behaviour (IEC's website).
description: Product Description Duracell recommends these batteries for everyday electronic devices such as digital cameras, photo flashes, toys or portable speakers. Of course, they are also suitable for frequently used devices such as torches, portable game controllers, razors, toothbrushes, etc Manufacturer Contact Information Duracell UK Limited., 23 Sheen Road, Richmond, TW9 1BN, United Kingdom.
